summary: Document upload feature in HR Module fully tested and working. Backend API tests: 11/11 passed. Frontend UI tests: All document upload flows working correctly including file selection, upload, list display, download, and delete.
critical_code_review_comments: Document upload implementation is complete and working correctly
Backend accepts multipart/form-data with document_type, document_name, and file fields
Files are stored in /app/storage/documents/{employee_id}/ with unique filenames
File serving endpoint properly returns files with correct content-type headers
Frontend has proper file input with file preview showing filename and size
Upload button is correctly disabled until all required fields are filled
Document list shows uploaded documents with Download and Delete actions
seed_data_creation: Created test documents with TEST_ prefix during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document upload feature fully tested. The implementation includes: 1) POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents/upload - accepts multipart/form-data with document_type, document_name, file fields, 2) GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents - lists all documents for an employee, 3) GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents/file/{filename} - serves the actual file, 4) DELETE /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents/{doc_id} - deletes a document. Frontend Documents tab in Employee Modal has proper file input, preview, upload button, and document list with download/delete actions.

backend: POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents/upload - Upload with different document types (aadhar, passport, driving_license, education, experience) - PASS
POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents/upload - Invalid file type rejection - PASS
DELETE /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents/{doc_id} - Delete nonexistent document returns 404 - PASS
frontend: Documents tab shows Upload New Document form with Document Type dropdown, Document Name input, File input - PASS
File input accepts PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC, DOCX files - PASS
Selected file shows preview with filename and size - PASS
Selected file can be removed before upload - PASS
Upload Document button is disabled until all fields are filled - PASS
Upload Document button triggers file upload - PASS
Success toast 'Document uploaded successfully' appears after upload - PASS
Uploaded document appears in document list - PASS
Document list shows Document Type, Name, Uploaded date, Status, Actions - PASS
Download button opens document in new tab - PASS
Delete button shows confirmation dialog - PASS
Delete confirmation removes document from list - PASS
Success toast 'Document deleted' appears after deletion - PASS

upload_form.document_type_dropdown: Working - shows all document types (Aadhar, PAN, Passport, Driving License, Bank Statement, Education, Experience, Offer Letter, Increment Letter, Salary Slip, Other)
upload_form.file_input: Working - accepts PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC, DOCX files up to 10MB
upload_form.file_preview: Working - shows selected filename and size with remove button
upload_form.upload_button: Working - disabled until all fields filled, triggers upload on click

document_list.columns: Document Type, Name, Uploaded, Status, Actions
document_list.download_button: Working - opens file in new tab
document_list.delete_button: Working - shows confirmation, removes document on confirm

backend_storage.supported_types: PDF, JPG, JPEG, PNG, DOC, DOCX
